# How to contribute

This repository contains plugin manifests that connect AI coding agents to the [Shopify Dev MCP server](https://github.com/Shopify/dev-mcp). We welcome contributions to improve support for existing agents or add support for new ones.

## Code of conduct

We expect all participants to read our [code of conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) to understand which actions are and aren't tolerated.

## Open development

All work happens directly on GitHub. Both Shopify team members and external contributors send pull requests which go through the same review process.

## Bugs and feature requests

We track issues in GitHub. Before opening a new issue, search existing ones to avoid duplicates. When [opening an issue](https://github.com/shopify-playground/shopify-plugins/issues/new), provide as much context as possible.

## Sending a pull request

1. Fork the repo and create your branch from `main`.
2. Make your changes to the relevant plugin manifest(s).
3. Open a pull request with a clear description of the change and why it's needed.

We'll review your pull request and either merge it, request changes, or close it with an explanation.

## Contributor License Agreement (CLA)

Each contributor is required to [sign a CLA](https://cla.shopify.com/). This process is automated as part of your first pull request and is only required once.
